daily_summary.headline: SpaceX Falcon 9 Launches and Aurora Viewing Opportunities

top_events.title: Falcon 9 Block 5 | CAS500-2 & Others
top_events.description: Launch of Falcon 9 carrying CAS500-2 and other payloads. Scheduled for 2026-05-03 at 06:59 UTC from Vandenberg SFB, CA, USA.
top_events.action: Watch live stream for detailed coverage.

top_events.title: Aurora Viewing Opportunity
top_events.description: Potential aurora visibility with Kp 4 at 06:00 UTC. Best viewed from latitudes above 65°.
top_events.action: Check sky conditions at high latitudes.

top_events.title: Starlink Group 17-29 Preparation
top_events.description: Upcoming Falcon 9 launch for Starlink satellites scheduled for 2026-05-06.

opportunities.recommendation: Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
